title: Insurtech Root's private auto combined ratio tops 200% for 2nd straight year
text: Historical article regarding ROOT's combined ratio performance in earlier years. ROOT's combined ratio was above 200% in 2021-2022 period as the company was still in loss-making phase. This represented the challenges the insurtech faced while building its data science capabilities and establishing its underwriting model. The company's combined ratio has since improved dramatically through 2023 and 2024, reflecting successful implementation of its telematics-based pricing strategy. The dramatic improvement from combined ratios above 200% to below 100% demonstrates the effectiveness of ROOT's data-driven approach. This historical context shows the magnitude of the operational turnaround that ROOT has achieved.
